news.headline: Employees in 3 cities including Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle are striking after failed talks over raises.
news.summary: Workers in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle have staged a walkout following unsuccessful negotiations between the company and the union regarding wage increases.

news.headline: Knightscope's K7 Alpha Testing ongoing, with 2024 recap planned, as per BUSINESS WIRE in Mountain View, California.
news.summary: The company based in Mountain View, California has announced that the Knightscope K7 is currently undergoing Alpha testing. The testing is in progress to ensure the functionality and performance of the security robot. Additionally, the company has released a recap of their progress in 2024. The Knightscope K7 is expected to be a significant advancement in security technology, offering innovative solutions to address various security challenges. Stay tuned for further updates on this development.

news.headline: Dogecoin crashes to lowest in a month, surpassing losses of Bitcoin and XRP. It leads top 10 coins with a 19% drop.
news.summary: Cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP have experienced significant decreases, but Dogecoin stands out as the top loser among the top 10 coins, plummeting by 19% in a single day.

news.headline: ZIVO Bioscience's study shows its proprietary ingredients reduce Avian Influenza transmission; Results from University of Delaware.
news.summary: Based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, Zivo Bioscience, Inc. (OTCQB: ZIVO) is a leading biotech/agtech research and development company focused on creating therapeutic, medicinal, and nutritional products from unique algal cultures. They have recently released positive findings from a study carried out in partnership with the University of Delaware. The study assessed the effectiveness of ZIVO’s exclusive active components in lowering the spread of Low Pathogenicity Avian Influenza (LPAI) virus. This research marks a significant breakthrough in combating avian influenza with potentially promising outcomes.

news.headline: MT Højgaard Danmark wins DKK 568 million contract for E45 motorway expansion near Hedensted, adding new lanes over six kilometers.
news.summary: MT Højgaard Danmark, a business unit of MT Højgaard Holding, has secured a substantial civil works contract from the Danish Road Directorate worth DKK 568 million. The contract involves the extension of the E45 motorway close to Hedensted, including laying new lanes in both directions along a six-kilometer stretch.

news.headline: Get up to 35% off Caribbean vacations to Aruba, Barbados, Bonaire, St. Croix, and St. Maarten with Divi Resorts.
news.summary: Enjoy exclusive savings of up to 35% on luxurious getaways to sought-after locations like Aruba, Barbados, Bonaire, St. Croix, and St. Maarten. This offer comes from Divi Resorts and is available from Chapel Hill, N.C., as of December 20, 2024. Dive into the beauty of crystal-clear waters, gentle tropical winds, and pristine golden beaches without breaking the bank. Make your travel dreams for 2025 a reality with this irresistible deal.

news.headline: ODL appoints Derek Fielding as Vice President of Strategic Marketing and Business Development, bringing 15 years of experience.
news.summary: In Zeeland, Michigan on December 20, 2024, ODL, Inc., a prominent supplier of building products, has named Derek Fielding as the Vice President of Strategic Marketing and Business Development. Fielding brings about 15 years of valuable experience from his time at Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc.

news.headline: Horizon Space Acquisition I Corp. postponed meeting to Dec. 23, 2024, for more shareholder engagement.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in New York, Horizon Space Acquisition I Corp. (NASDAQ: HSPO) convened an extraordinary general meeting to adjourn the meeting to December 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The decision, made solely to facilitate further discussions with shareholders, aimed to extend the engagement period. This adjustment provides additional time for the company to interact with its shareholders effectively.

news.headline: HIKO Holdings sells 5.2M shares in Azerion; Wim de Pundert buys most, retains 1.2M shares for approx $$.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Azerion disclosed that HIKO Holdings has divested its final 5,219,747 shares in the company for personal motives. Following this, Wim de Pundert, the Chairman of the Supervisory Board, has obtained these shares and plans to distribute most of them to a select group of investors at the initial cost. de Pundert aims to keep 1,219,747 of the shares purchased from HIKO Holdings for personal holdings.

news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. has secured a time charter contract with NYK for m/v Myrto at US$12,000/day until March 1, 2026.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on December 20, 2024, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a prominent global shipping company specializing in dry bulk vessels, announced a new time charter contract. The deal, facilitated by a wholly-owned subsidiary, is with Nippon Yusen Kabushiki Kaisha of Tokyo for the Kamsarmax dry bulk vessel, the m/v Myrto. The contract sets a gross charter rate of US$12,000 per day, with a 5.00% commission to third parties. This charter is slated to run from December 23, 2024, until at least March 1, 2026, potentially extending up to May 15, 2026.

news.headline: 63% of Americans trust in state courts according to 2024 State of the State Courts survey by National Center for State Courts.
news.summary: In Williamsburg, Virginia, the National Center for State Courts' 2024 State of the State Courts survey revealed a noteworthy trend - a growing number of Americans are placing trust and confidence in state courts. Specifically, the survey indicates that approximately 63% of Americans now hold faith in state courts. This demonstrates an increasing level of confidence in the judicial system among the populace.

news.headline: OceanPal Inc. reported $7.5 million in vessel revenues, with a net loss of $0.2 million for Q3 2024, an improvement from Q3 2023.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on December 20, 2024, OceanPal Inc. (NASDAQ: OP), a worldwide shipping company focusing on vessel ownership, announced their financial results. The company recorded vessel revenues of $7.5 million, with a net loss of $0.2 million and a net loss attributable to common stockholders of $0.6 million for the third quarter of 2024. This marks a significant improvement from the same period in 2023, which saw vessel revenues at $3.9 million, a net loss of $3.4 million, and a net loss attributable to common stockholders of $3.9 million.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Real Estate completes buy-back of 61,721 shares for EUR 166,646.70, excluding brokerage fees.
news.summary: INVL Baltic Real Estate has successfully completed its share buy-back program, acquiring a total of 61,721 shares at a cost of approximately EUR 166,646.70, excluding brokerage fees.

news.headline: Heimar hf. is in exclusive talks to potentially acquire all shares in Gróska ehf., with ID no. 680515-1580.
news.summary: Heimar hf. and the shareholders of Gróska ehf. have announced today that they have agreed to enter into exclusive discussions for a possible acquisition deal. The agreement involves Heimar potentially acquiring all shares in Gróska ehf., a company with ID no. 680515-1580. The negotiations will focus on the terms and conditions of the acquisition.

news.headline: Health Alliance expands into Indiana and West Virginia with new medical centers, reshaping healthcare delivery.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 20, 2024, The Health Alliance, a prominent national value-based care company, is making significant strides in transforming healthcare services through its swift growth. The company has unveiled additional medical facilities in Indiana and West Virginia as part of its ongoing efforts to enhance access to quality healthcare.

news.headline: Vanda Pharma's VGT-1849A granted Orphan Drug Designation for Polycythemia Vera treatment by FDA, a selective ASO JAK2 inhibitor.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: VNDA) revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has bestowed Orphan Drug Designation upon VGT-1849A. This compound is a specific antisense oligonucleotide (ASO)-based JAK2 inhibitor intended for treating a certain condition.

news.headline: Carnival Corp beats Q4 guidance, reports record full year results, aims for 20% earnings growth in 2025, expects to reach 2026 EBITDA target ahead of schedule.
news.summary: Keeping up with its promising growth trajectory, Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE/LSE: CCL; NYSE: CUK) anticipates achieving its SEA Change EBITDA target for 2026 a year ahead of schedule. The company, headquartered in Miami, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and entire fiscal year of 2024. Looking forward, Carnival Corporation & plc shared insights on the anticipated financial outcomes for both the first quarter and full year of 2025.

news.headline: Celebration in Washington D.C. honors women veterans and military spouses; Paden Sickles wins $50,000 grant.
news.summary: Paden Sickles, founder of SickFit, emerged victorious by securing a $50,000 grant during a showcase highlighting innovation and entrepreneurship among veterans. The event took place on December 12, 2024, ahead of the Army-Navy weekend, and was organized by Warrior Rising, a prominent nonprofit that aids veteran entrepreneurs.

news.headline: Quoin Pharma prices public offering at $6.8M, selling 15,111,110 shares for $0.45 each with additional warrants issued.
news.summary: Quoin Pharmaceuticals Ltd., a company focused on rare diseases, recently priced a public offering of 15,111,110 ordinary shares represented by 15,111,110 American Depositary Shares (or pre-funded warrants), along with Series F and Series G warrants. The purchase price for each ADS and associated warrants is $0.45. The Series F and Series G warrants have an exercise price of $0.45 per share, becoming exercisable immediately after issuance, with expiration periods of two years and five years, respectively. This move aims to raise funds for the company's ongoing clinical stage developments.

news.headline: Carnival Corporation & PLC exceeds fourth quarter guidance, reports record full year results. Revenues hit $25 billion, net income $1.9 billion. Expects 20% earnings growth in 2025. News source: PRNewswire.
news.summary: Carnival Corporation & plc announced strong financial results for 2024, with full year revenues hitting $25 billion, a 15% increase from the prior year. Net income was $1.9 billion, and adjusted EBITDA reached a record $6.1 billion. The company exceeded its 2024 guidance by $700 million. The fourth quarter saw a net income of $303 million compared to a loss of $48 million in 2023. The company expects adjusted EBITDA per available lower berth for 2025 to be the highest in almost two decades, achieving the 2026 SEA Change target one year early. Additionally, Carnival Corporation made significant progress in sustainability, reducing greenhouse gas emissions and food waste. The company plans to capitalize on improved interest rates and reduce interest expenses, focusing on rebuilding its balance sheet. Carnival also highlighted various recent accolades and achievements of its cruise lines. Carnival Corporation & plc expects adjusted net income for 2025 to be over 20% higher than 2024, reaching approximately $2.3 billion, and adjusted EBITDA is projected to be around $6.6 billion. The company continues to focus on sustainability efforts and achieving its financial targets.

news.headline: Azitra, Inc. will present at Biotech Showcase 2025 alongside J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, focused on precision dermatology.
news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company, Azitra, Inc. (NYSE American: AZTR), specializing in precision dermatology treatments, will be presenting at the Biotech Showcase 2025 event from January 13-15. This news was shared from Branford, Connecticut, on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Synaptogenix forms special committee to explore value creation opportunities; has $19.6 million in cash, reduced cash burn rate.
news.summary: As of September 30, 2024, Synaptogenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPX), an emerging biopharmaceutical company, reported holding $19.6 million in cash and cash equivalents. The company anticipates a significant reduction in its cash burn rate. This information was announced in New York on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: WOW! launches fiber internet in Brighton, Michigan, offering high-speed network to residents and businesses. NYSE: WOW.
news.summary: A new state-of-the-art network has been introduced by WOW! Internet, TV & Phone (NYSE: WOW) in the Central Michigan community. This launch brings high-speed internet, TV, and phone services to residents and businesses in the area. The announcement was made on Dec. 20, 2024, in Englewood, Colorado. WOW! is a prominent broadband services provider that continues to expand its innovative offerings to more locations across the country.

news.headline: San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (SJT) won't offer December 2024 cash distribution, with production costs exceeding proceeds.
news.summary: Today, in Dallas, on December 20, 2024, Argent Trust Company, acting as the trustee for the San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: SJT), announced that there will be no monthly cash distribution declared for holders of its Units of beneficial interest. The Trustee's decision impacts numerous investors involved with the Trust.

news.headline: West Monroe acquires Inspired Health, boosting life sciences revenue by 30% and expanding private equity support in Boston.
news.summary: West Monroe, a renowned global business and technology consulting firm, announced its acquisition of Inspired Health, a Boston-based company. This strategic move has led to a remarkable 30% increase in West Monroe's revenue in the life sciences sector. The acquisition not only bolsters the firm's support for private equity but also positions it favorably amidst the current trend of escalating investment activities. This development highlights West Monroe's commitment to expanding its presence in the industry and enhancing its service offerings to better cater to the growing needs of clients.

news.headline: Truist to announce Q4 2024 earnings on Jan 17, 2025. CEO Bill Rogers and CFO Mike Maguire to lead call.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) is set to announce its fourth-quarter 2024 financial results on Friday, January 17, 2025, before the market opens. The company's Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Bill Rogers, along with Chief Financial Officer Mike Maguire, will be leading the disclosure. This update suggests that stakeholders and investors can anticipate key insights into the company's performance and financial standing. Stay tuned for further details on this significant financial announcement.

news.headline: E2open promotes Pawan Joshi to CSO and appoints Rachit Lohani as CPTO. NYSE: ETWO, leading multi-enterprise network.
news.summary: E2open Parent Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ETWO), a leading connected supply chain SaaS platform, based in Dallas, has recently appointed Pawan Joshi as the Chief Strategy Officer (CSO). In this newly created executive position, Joshi will be in charge of overseeing corporate strategy and fostering growth through strategic client interactions and innovative approaches. Additionally, Rachit Lohani joins the company as the Chief Product and Technology Officer (CPTO), another newly established role that merges product management and technology initiatives under one leadership. E2open boasts the largest multi-enterprise network in its sector.

news.headline: Merit Medical's WRAPSODY Cell-Impermeable Endoprosthesis gets FDA approval, sets commercialization in USA for 2025.
news.summary: In South Jordan, Utah on December 20, 2024, Merit Medical Systems, Inc. disclosed that their WRAPSODY® Cell-Impermeable Endoprosthesis has obtained premarket approval from the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA). As a key player in healthcare technology, the company, listed on NASDAQ as MMSI, is now equipped to initiate the commercialization of this device in the United States starting in 2025.

news.headline: French regulator approves BPCE subsidiary Hexarq for crypto operations, the second after Société Générale’s Forge.
news.summary: Hexarq, a cryptocurrency subsidiary of BPCE, has become the second banking crypto entity to be approved by French regulatory authority AMF, following in the footsteps of Société Générale's Forge. This marks a significant development in the industry, with Hexarq now joining a limited group of approved entities in the country. The approval from AMF highlights the increasing acceptance and recognition of cryptocurrency-related initiatives within the traditional banking sector.

news.headline: Travel + Leisure Co. CFO Mike Hug set to retire in 2025, according to announcement from company.
news.summary: Travel + Leisure Co. has disclosed that their CFO, Mike Hug, is set to retire in the year 2025. This announcement was made in Orlando, Florida, by the company.

news.headline: NYSE introduces daily pre-market update and weekly recap on Dec 20, 2024. Stay updated with market insights and more.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) announced the launch of a daily pre-market update and additional content from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can now access the NYSE Pre-market update and a Weekly Recap for market insights. Stay informed with the latest information directly from the iconic NYSE Trading Floor. This initiative aims to provide valuable market information to investors.

news.headline: Watercrest Santa Rosa Beach hosts festive holiday celebration to benefit Wreaths Across America.
news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, on December 20, 2024, the residents and staff at Watercrest Santa Rosa Beach Assisted Living and Memory Care came together for a holiday event supporting Wreaths Across America. The festive celebration showcased a spirit of giving, with a focus on giving back to the community.

news.headline: Skyharbour completes private placement, raising C$10M in funds.
Cryptocurrency market sees $1.4B liquidations as Bitcoin falls. Ethereum down 16%, XRP 18%, Dogecoin 26%.
news.summary: Other cryptocurrencies have also experienced significant declines. Ethereum saw a decrease of 16% within 24 hours, while XRP plummeted by 18% and Dogecoin by 26%. These fluctuations underscore the volatility within the altcoin market in recent trading sessions.

news.headline: The First of Long Island Corp (Nasdaq: FLIC) declares $.21/share dividend, payable Jan 9, 2025 to Dec 31, 2024 shareholders.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Melville, New York, The First of Long Island Corporation (Nasdaq: FLIC) disclosed a cash dividend of $.21 per share for the fourth quarter. Shareholders as of December 31, 2024, will receive this dividend on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Intermedia's success with service providers in 2024 leads to growth and innovation in 2025 by offering AI-powered solutions for legacy migrations, branding services, and customer relationships.
news.summary: Intermedia offers advanced AI-driven communication solutions to Service Providers, aiding in the quick transition from outdated systems and allowing partners to customize services under their own brand and retain control of customer relationships. This helps to address the evolving communication requirements of businesses in the ever-changing landscape.

news.headline: Scope Technologies Corp. partners with Percepture for growth of QSE brand, utilizing full-service digital marketing and PR agency.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 20, 2024, Scope Technologies Corp. (CSE: SCPE) (OTCQB: SCPCF) (FSE: VN8) has disclosed their collaboration with Percepture, a prominent full-service digital marketing and public relations agency. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the Company's marketing efforts and public image.

news.headline: Bluenote secures $10M from Lux Capital & Elad Gil to enhance life sciences workflows with AI, aiming to expedite healthcare solutions.
news.summary: Bluenote aims to expedite the delivery of essential medical supplies to patients and healthcare providers by optimizing regulatory processes. Recently, in San Francisco on December 20, 2024, Bluenote disclosed receiving $10 million in funding for its innovative AI technology platform designed for...

news.headline: Forpak Automation introduces LayerPak, a new food manufacturing solution to optimize stacking efficiency in production.
news.summary: In Minnetonka, Minnesota, on December 20, 2024, Forpak Automation revealed the introduction of its newest food manufacturing innovation, LayerPak. This cutting-edge solution is designed to enhance the efficiency of processing food items that require stacking or paper insertion. The unveiling signals Forpak Automation's commitment to advancing production processes in the food industry.

news.headline: VIP Play, Inc. (VIPZ) obtains access to West Virginia market for sports betting and online casino, launching app in early 2025.
news.summary: VIP Play, Inc. (VIPZ) has finalized a deal with Delaware North to gain market access to West Virginia for Sports Betting and Online Casino activities. The agreement was made official on December 20, 2024, in SARASOTA, Florida. VIP Play, Inc. is a well-established mobile gambling operator and this move opens up new opportunities in the state. This partnership marks a significant milestone for VIPZ as they continue to expand their presence in the industry.

news.headline: Financial analysts are once again making unreliable forecasts, impacting market stability.
Steel Solutions acquires operating assets of Colvin Steel, a Las Vegas-based subcontractor, expanding in Nevada.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 20, 2024, Steel Solutions, a prominent steel fabrication and erecting firm, revealed the purchase of Colvin Steel's operational assets, a well-established steel subcontractor located in Las Vegas. The acquisition process was completed earlier this month after being sealed with a final...

news.headline: Experts recommend reframing financial resolutions to set up goals for success, emphasizing mindset shift.
news.summary: According to experts in psychology and personal finance, individuals should not lose hope in improving their situation. Instead, it is crucial to change the perspective on the matter to make progress.

news.headline: AAP appoints Michael Beland as Sr. VP, Chief Accounting Officer effective Jan. 5, 2025. He will oversee accounting, tax, and financial reporting.
news.summary: Raleigh, NC - Advance Auto Parts, Inc. revealed the appointment of Michael Beland as senior vice president, controller, and chief accounting officer, commencing January 5, 2025. Beland, joining the leading automotive aftermarket parts provider in North America, will handle various crucial areas including enterprise-wide accounting operations, tax, external financial reporting, and compliance. The company, listed under NYSE as AAP, caters to professional installers and DIY customers, playing a key role in the automotive sector.

news.headline: Cyngn announced $20.0 million follow-on offering priced at the market for their AI-powered autonomous driving software.
news.summary: A company named Cyngn Inc., based in Menlo Park, California, disclosed on December 20, 2024, that it has priced a follow-on offering at the market. Cyngn is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CYN and specializes in AI-driven autonomous driving software for industrial use. The offering was executed at a gross amount that has not been specified in the available information.

news.headline: Clairyon rebrands from Healcisio, aims for rapid growth, Brenda Schmidt new CEO, Michael McCurdy CMO.
news.summary: In San Diego on December 20, 2024, Brenda Schmidt was announced as the Co-founder and CEO, while Michael McCurdy was appointed as the Chief Medical Officer of Clairyon, previously known as Healcisio, Inc. The new name showcases the company's shift towards a period of rapid expansion and commercial development. This significant development marks an important step...

news.headline: DeepIntent's HealthFirst Vaccine Audiences recognized by PM360 as one of 2024's most interesting innovations.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, PM360, a prominent trade publication for marketing executives in the pharmaceutical, biotech, medical device, and diagnostics sectors, featured DeepIntent's HealthFirst Vaccine Audiences in its yearly Innovations Issue. This edition showcases the top trends and innovations in the industry.

news.headline: BillionToOne's UNITY NIPT test improves maternity care in remote areas, reducing travel burdens for high-risk pregnancies.
news.summary: A precision diagnostics company, BillionToOne, is making strides in improving maternal care in remote communities by expanding access to the UNITY Prenatal Test. The test, launched on Dec. 20, 2024, in Menlo Park, California, aims to reduce travel burdens for high-risk pregnancies. This initiative is crucial in areas where access to specialized medical facilities is limited. The UNITY Prenatal Test offers advanced screening for pregnant women, improving the chances of early detection and effective management of potential complications. By bringing this technology to remote regions, BillionToOne is helping to enhance maternal healthcare outcomes and support high-risk pregnancies. This expansion signifies a significant step towards addressing the challenges faced by pregnant women, with the potential to positively impact a large number of individuals in underserved areas.

news.headline: Fed's Hammack: I would prefer to see more progress on prices before cutting.
Bybit Card holiday giveaway offers rewards to users from Dec. 20, 2024, to Jan. 31, 2025. Bybit is the world's second-largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on December 20, 2024, Bybit, ranked as the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, announced an extension of holiday celebrations through generous virtual gifts for Bybit Card holders. Between December 20, 2024, and January 31, 2025, users can enjoy perks with each use of their Bybit Card.
